backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores payment records in a map and exposes `submitPayment` (update) and `getAllPayments` (query) methods, returning payments sorted alphabetically by full name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three features (AdminPage component, useQueries hook, and App routing/navigation) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the payment form and admin page implementation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, card, primary, accent, destructive, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Payment Submission Form', mounting the app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component using simple `useState`-based routing to switch between `PaymentPage` (default) and `AdminPage`, passing navigation callbacks as props.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: Payment form component with field-level validation, amber/light theme styling, a success confirmation screen with a checkmark, and submission via the `useSubmitPayment` mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, recreating it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating dependent queries accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, AuthClient lifecycle, and exposing identity and status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentForm.ts: Custom hook managing payment form state, field-level validation, auto-formatting for card number and expiry date, blur/touch tracking, and form reset logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks: `useSubmitPayment` for submitting payment data via a backend actor mutation, and `useGetAllPayments` for fetching all payment records.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a light amber/neutral theme, and provides reusable component classes like `.payment-card`, `.payment-input`, and `.btn-gold`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all submitted payment records in a styled table with masked card numbers and formatted amounts, including a refresh button and stats bar.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Main payment page that renders the `PaymentForm` component within a branded layout including a header, trust badges, and footer, with an optional navigation button to the admin view.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with oklch-based color tokens for neutral and amber palettes, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-query plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's versioned state, summarizing it as a payment submission form app and listing all implemented features such as form validation, light theme, admin page, and fintech visual design.
